ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit event */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being edited */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment after editing */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was edited */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit event */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being edited */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post after editing */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was edited */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who edited the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit the moderator manages */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined as a moderator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the moderator is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote event */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "time_voted" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote event */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "time_voted" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report event */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the post */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "time_reported" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report event */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the comment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "time_reported" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, vote, report) */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post involved (if applicable) */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment involved (if applicable) */,
  "time_occurred" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user receives email notifications */,
  "post_sorting" TEXT /* Default sorting preference for posts (e.g., hot, new, top) */,
  "comment_sorting" TEXT /* Default sorting preference for comments (e.g., best, new, old) */,
  "default_subreddits" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of default subreddits the user follows */,
  "blocked_users" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of blocked users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subreddit_analytics" (
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts in the subreddit */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments in the subreddit */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers to the subreddit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subreddit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_analytics" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views of the post */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "upvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes on the post */,
  "downvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes on the post */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_analytics" (
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment */,
  "upvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes on the comment */,
  "downvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes on the comment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)
